changeSet.author: danikanov
changeSet.sql: alter table schedule.arrangements drop constraint ck_status; alter table schedule.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('NEW', 'SCHEDULED', 'RUNNING', 'STOPPING', 'STOPPED', 'FINISHED', 'STOPPED_BY_SERVICE_MODE', 'STOPPED_MAX_CHECK_UNITS_COUNT'));

rollback.sql: alter table schedule.arrangements drop constraint ck_status; alter table schedule.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('NEW', 'SCHEDULED', 'RUNNING', 'STOPPING', 'STOPPED', 'FINISHED'));
